mapper.sql: id, name, auth_object_level, applicable_region, auth_publish_level, auth_publish_org, publish_year, summary, status, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, delete_flag
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM auth_letter WHERE delete_flag = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND auth_object_level LIKE CONCAT('%', #{authObjectLevel}, '%')
AND applicable_region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{applicableRegion}, '%')
AND auth_publish_level LIKE CONCAT('%', #{authPublishLevel}, '%')
AND auth_publish_org LIKE CONCAT('%', #{authPublishOrg}, '%')
AND publish_year = #{publishYear}
AND status = #{status}
SELECT FROM auth_letter WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_letter (name, auth_object_level, applicable_region, auth_publish_level, auth_publish_org, publish_year, summary, status, created_by, created_time, delete_flag) VALUES (#{name}, #{authObjectLevel}, #{applicableRegion}, #{authPublishLevel}, #{authPublishOrg}, #{publishYear}, #{summary}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_letter SET name = #{name}, auth_object_level = #{authObjectLevel}, applicable_region = #{applicableRegion}, auth_publish_level = #{authPublishLevel}, auth_publish_org = #{authPublishOrg}, publish_year = #{publishYear}, summary = #{summary}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
UPDATE auth_letter SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE auth_letter SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
UPDATE auth_letter SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
